mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS date, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y.%m') AS ym, total_score AS totalScore, diagnosis_type AS diagnosisType, version_code AS versionCode, desired_job AS desiredJob, cohort_size AS cohortSize, cohort_percentile AS cohortPercentile, professionalism_score AS professionalism, digital_score AS digital, leadership_score AS leadership, problem_solving_score AS problemSolving, communication_score AS communication FROM sys_competency_diagnosis WHERE user_id = #{userSn} ORDER BY created_at

SELECT COALESCE(p.custom_title, r.title) AS title, p.source_type_code AS source, p.term_code AS term, p.status_code AS status FROM sys_action_planner p LEFT JOIN sys_resource r ON r.resource_id = p.resource_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userSn} ORDER BY p.planner_id
SELECT current_status FROM sys_user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userSn}

SELECT i.USER_NM AS userNm, i.EMAIL AS email, i.MBTLNUM AS mbtlnum, i.BRTHDY AS brthdy, p.persona_code AS personaCode, (SELECT a.MAJOR_NM FROM TN_RESUME_ACDMCR a JOIN TN_RESUME r ON r.RESUME_SN = a.RESUME_SN WHERE r.USER_SN = i.USER_SN ORDER BY (a.LAST_DGRI_SE_CODE IS NULL), a.LAST_DGRI_SE_CODE DESC, a.ACDMCR_SN DESC LIMIT 1) AS majorNm, (SELECT a.LAST_DGRI_SE_CODE FROM TN_RESUME_ACDMCR a JOIN TN_RESUME r ON r.RESUME_SN = a.RESUME_SN WHERE r.USER_SN = i.USER_SN ORDER BY (a.LAST_DGRI_SE_CODE IS NULL), a.LAST_DGRI_SE_CODE DESC, a.ACDMCR_SN DESC LIMIT 1) AS degreeCode, (SELECT c.CLSF_NM FROM TN_RESUME_CAREER c JOIN TN_RESUME r ON r.RESUME_SN = c.RESUME_SN WHERE r.USER_SN = i.USER_SN AND (c.CAREER_END_DE IS NULL OR c.CAREER_END_DE = '') ORDER BY c.CAREER_BEGIN_DE DESC, c.CAREER_SN DESC LIMIT 1) AS careerTitle, (SELECT c.CAREER_BEGIN_DE FROM TN_RESUME_CAREER c JOIN TN_RESUME r ON r.RESUME_SN = c.RESUME_SN WHERE r.USER_SN = i.USER_SN AND (c.CAREER_END_DE IS NULL OR c.CAREER_END_DE = '') ORDER BY c.CAREER_BEGIN_DE DESC, c.CAREER_SN DESC LIMIT 1) AS careerBeginDe FROM TN_INDVDL_INFO i LEFT JOIN sys_user_profile p ON p.user_id = i.USER_SN WHERE i.USER_SN = #{userSn} LIMIT 1

SELECT d.competency_id AS diagnosisId, DATE_FORMAT(d.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS date, DATE_FORMAT(d.created_at, '%H:%i') AS time, CONCAT('CCH-', DATE_FORMAT(d.created_at, '%y%m%d'), LPAD(d.competency_id, 2, '0')) AS code, d.version_code AS versionCode, d.diagnosis_type AS diagnosisType, d.desired_job AS desiredJob, d.concern_summary AS concernSummary, d.total_score AS totalScore, d.persona_code AS personaCode, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_action_planner ap WHERE ap.diagnosis_id = d.competency_id) AS actions, (SELECT AVG(sv.rating) FROM sys_ai_report_survey sv JOIN sys_ai_report ar ON ar.report_id = sv.report_id WHERE ar.diagnosis_id = d.competency_id) AS satisfaction FROM sys_competency_diagnosis d WHERE d.user_id = #{userSn} ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
